creator.description: Who or what created the resource.

created_time.description: The time the attachment was created as an ISO formatted timestamp.

file_name.description: The original filename of the uploaded attachment.

mime_type.description: The mime type of the attachment.

size.description: The size in bytes of the attachment.

scan_status.description: The scan status of the attachment, indicating whether the attachment has been scanned and, if so, the result. INFECTED or PENDING attachments may not be downloaded.
